prompt: Build a task management system with users, projects, and tasks. Include role-based access control where admins can see everything and users can only see their own tasks.
Create an e-commerce platform that sells digital products. It needs a product catalog, shopping cart, and a checkout page.
Develop a real-time chat application with multiple chat rooms, online user status, and message history.
Build a CRM system for a real estate agency to track leads, properties, and agent assignments.
Create a blog engine with markdown support, tags, categories, and an admin dashboard for content management.
Develop a recipe sharing app where users can upload recipes, rate them, and create meal plans.
Build an inventory management system with barcode scanning support, low stock alerts, and supplier tracking.
Create a fitness tracking app that logs workouts, calculates calories burned, and displays progress charts.
Develop a job board application where employers can post jobs and candidates can apply with their resumes.
Build a personal finance tracker that allows users to connect bank accounts, categorize expenses, and set budgets.
